meta.title: Home
meta.description: Modern, responsive company website for Webbekonomi & Webbdesign AB with a focus on finance, web development, and design.

hero.title: Finance, web, and design that build a stronger company.
hero.description: Webbekonomi & Webbdesign AB helps companies create calm in their finances, clarity in the digital customer journey, and a more refined business foundation.

intro.title: We help companies combine financial confidence with a modern digital presence.
intro.description: For many businesses, finance, web, and design are more connected than they first appear. When all three areas evolve together, the whole experience becomes both stronger and more sustainable.

location.title: A clear contact path, quick response, and space for continued dialogue.
location.description: This section provides a solid base for contact details and a map area. The content can later be replaced with final details or connected to a real map.
location.mapTitle: Stockholm, the Mälaren Valley, and digital collaborations across Sweden.
location.mapDescription: This space is built to be easily replaced by a real map later, but already works as a clear location marker in the contact flow.

meta.title: About
meta.description: Get to know Webbekonomi & Webbdesign AB and how we combine finance, web development, and design into one business-focused whole.

header.title: We build calm, direction, and digital clarity for modern companies.
header.description: Webbekonomi & Webbdesign AB is built for companies that want a partner with both a business perspective and technical understanding. The goal is to create a stable foundation that feels professional from day one and can keep evolving over time.

direction.title: We believe in clear solutions that make everyday work easier and the business stronger.
direction.description: It should be easy to understand what is delivered, why it matters, and what the next step looks like. That is why we build both design and structure with the same level of care.
direction.cardTitle: A partner for companies that want to grow without losing control.
paragraphs: We know that companies rarely have time for unnecessary complexity. That is why we work with clear structure, direct communication, and solutions that feel relevant to the business, not just to the technology.
When finance, web, and design are coordinated, fewer gaps appear between strategy and execution. That creates better decision support internally and a more trustworthy experience externally.

workflow.title: How we build projects that feel clear from the start.
workflow.description: A simple working model makes it easier to stay focused, make decisions, and create deliveries you can rely on.

reasons.title: A professional foundation you can keep building on.
reasons.description: We do not prioritize only aesthetics or only technology in isolation, but how everything works together when the business needs to grow.

meta.title: Services
meta.description: Explore Webbekonomi & Webbdesign AB's services in finance, web development, web design, and digital advisory.

header.title: Four focus areas that strengthen both the business and the digital experience.
header.description: The services are structured as a strong modern foundation. They can be used individually or combined into a clear end-to-end solution.

offer.title: Professional deliveries with clear structure.
offer.description: Each area is built to be easy to understand, easy to extend, and easy to adapt to the company's next step.

delivery.title: A working model that keeps the focus on the right things.
delivery.description: We want projects to feel clear, durable, and easy to follow. That is why we structure the work in distinct steps.

cta.title: Do you need a clearer way forward?
cta.description: We are happy to help prioritize the right first step and build a solution that feels professional from the beginning.

meta.title: Contact
meta.description: Contact Webbekonomi & Webbdesign AB by form, email, or phone to discuss finance, web development, or design.

header.title: Tell us what you want to improve, build, or gain better control over.
header.description: The contact section is already structured to feel professional and can easily be connected to real form delivery through EmailJS or another backend later.

form.title: Let us take the first step together.
form.description: Fill out the form and we will come back with a clear next step, whether it is about finance, web, or design.

map.title: Space for a map or a future booking module.
map.description: This panel already works as a clear premium area, but can easily be replaced later with Google Maps, a book-a-meeting flow, or more detailed contact information.

highlights.remoteDelivery: Stockholm as a base, digital delivery across Sweden.
highlights.projectFit: Suitable for both ongoing collaboration and clearly scoped project starts.

message.label: Message
message.placeholder: Describe your current situation, goals, or what you need help with.

validation.email: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.message: Please describe your needs in at least 20 characters.
validation.name: Please enter your name.
validation.phone: Please enter a valid phone number.
validation.service: Please choose the service you are interested in.

contact.hint: For real form delivery, you can set VITE_EMAILJS_* in the project's environment variables.

feedback.successConfigured: Thank you. Your inquiry has been sent, and we will get back to you as soon as we can.
feedback.successDemo: The form is ready to use. Add the EmailJS keys in .env to send for real.
feedback.errorSend: The form could not be sent right now. Please try again in a moment.
feedback.errorGeneric: Something went wrong while handling the form. Check the settings and try again.

footer.heading: A modern partner for finance, web, and design.
footer.description: A professional foundation for companies that want to combine business control with a clear digital presence.

bottom.primary: {{year}} {{siteName}}. A professional foundation for continued growth.
bottom.secondary: Built with React, TypeScript, Tailwind, and a focus on responsive quality.

businessValue.title: Finance with business value
businessValue.description: We create clear financial flows, reporting, and structure that lead to better decision-making.

webSolutions.title: Web solutions that work
webSolutions.description: From landing pages to scalable company websites with a focus on clarity, speed, and conversion.

designTrust.title: Design that builds trust
designTrust.description: Visual direction, tone, and components that make the company feel polished and modern.

holistic.title: A whole instead of silos
holistic.description: When finance, technology, and design work together, both decisions and the customer experience become stronger.

reliableDelivery.title: Reliable delivery
reliableDelivery.description: We prioritize structure, realistic choices, and solutions that work in everyday operations.

businessFocus.title: Business focus in every detail
businessFocus.description: The visual layer should support the business, not sit beside it. That is why we always start with the goal.

financeReporting.title: Finance & reporting
financeReporting.description: For companies that want better control, clearer decision support, and a more stable financial everyday setup.
bullets: Structure for ongoing finance work and follow-up
Reports that simplify decisions and priorities
Advisory that connects numbers to business goals

webDevelopment.title: Web development
webDevelopment.description: Modern websites and digital solutions that are fast, responsive, and built to grow.
bullets: Responsive company websites with clear information structure
A technical foundation that is easy to extend
Focus on performance, content, and user flow

brandExperience.title: Web design & brand surface
brandExperience.description: Design systems, tone of voice, and visual decisions that raise quality in every digital touchpoint.
bullets: A design direction that fits a modern company
A premium feel without becoming overworked

digitalAdvisory.title: Digital advisory
digitalAdvisory.description: Practical support for priorities, improvements, and choices when the company is developing digitally.
bullets: Analysis of current state, target state, and improvement opportunities
Prioritization of the right next step
Ongoing sparring for web, processes, and business

currentState.title: 1. Current state & goals
currentState.description: We map the current situation, identify bottlenecks, and define the right level to aim for.

direction.title: 2. Direction & priorities
direction.description: Together we choose the solution that creates a clear effect now while still holding up over time.

delivery.title: 3. Delivery in clear steps
delivery.description: The work is divided into understandable deliveries with professional structure and regular check-ins.

refinement.title: 4. Refinement & support
refinement.description: Once the foundation is in place, we can continue to develop, improve, and support based on the next need.

onePartner.title: One contact path for multiple needs
onePartner.description: You avoid coordinating finance, technology, and design across several separate vendors.

communication.title: Clear communication
communication.description: We make complex topics understandable and keep projects easy to follow for both leadership and teams.

modernForm.title: Modern but business-oriented form
modernForm.description: The visual expression should inspire trust while still feeling current, technical, and professional.

practical.title: Practical solutions that last
practical.description: We do not build to impress in a presentation, but to make the work function in real life.
